drd_rule_full:
JOIN ccal_repl_owner.txn t with ccal_repl_owner.Apa ap on ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
JOIN ccsi_owner.ar_grp_subdim ar_grp_subdim ON ar_grp_subdim.ar_id = t.ar_id
AND  t.td >= ar_grp_subdim.eff_dt
AND  t.td < ar_grp_subdim.end_dt
join ccsi_owner.ar_dim bkr_ar_dim on ar_grp_subdim.linked_bkr_ar_id = bkr_ar_dim.ar_id
AND  t.td >= ar_dim.eff_dt
AND  t.td < ar_dim.end_dt
Review decision: Explain what is the problem , as I can see the DRD rule is cutting
human_explanation: ODI never derives this column anywhere in the chain: every STEPn entry is a pass-through reference and the MERGE just copies S.<col> from the USING subquery (which is itself reading the pass-through value).  In production the column will be NULL unless an out-of-scope UPDATE populates it.  Real ODI gap -- the DRD's stated source attribute 'ABC_CLSS_NM' is never projected at any step (also not under any sibling target).
recommendation: REAL_ODI_GAP -- column declared but never derived; DRD source 'ABC_CLSS_NM' is absent from the entire ODI chain

drd_rule_full:
ccal_repl_owner.txn t 
join ccal_repl_owner.apa ap ON ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
join ccal_repl_owner.AR_DIM BKR_AR_DIM ON T.AR_ID = BKR_AR_DIM.AR_ID
and TD >= BKR_AR_DIM.EFF_DT (+) 
and TD < BKR_AR_DIM.END_DT (+))

If BKR_AR_DIM.ORIG_SRC_STM_CD = 'BKRBO1' then populate with T.AR_ID
Else if AP.BKR_AR_ID is not NULL then use ap.BKR_AR_ID
Else join ccsi_owner.AR_GRP_SUBDIM asd ON asd.AR_ID = t.AR_ID
and t.td >= asd.EFF_DT
and t.td < asd.END_DT
and populate with asd.LINKED_BKR_AR_ID

[ETL Notes block]:
Check for regexp_like(cv.cl_val_code,'^APACSH[0-7][0-9]')
For a Transaction, 
If only one record exists then consider that record.
If 2 records exists ( 
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then consider skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          (1) calculate aggregated value from APA.TXN_AMT fields from 'APACSH04' and 'APACSH11' and store it in Cash Transaction Amount and Cash System base currency amount
          (2) populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else Drop those 2 records exception entire transaction
)

APASEC :
Check for cl_val_Code like '^APASEC[0-7][0-9]' THEN consider as 'Security' record.

recommendation: SEMANTIC_MATCH -- ODI's CASE WHEN realises the DRD WHERE/IF

)

AND  t.td < fa_number_v1.end_date

AND t.td < brk_own_psn.end_date

human_explanation: ODI never derives this column anywhere in the chain: every STEPn entry is a pass-through reference and the MERGE just copies S.<col> from the USING subquery (which is itself reading the pass-through value).  In production the column will be NULL unless an out-of-scope UPDATE populates it.  Real ODI gap -- the DRD's stated source attribute 'CURRENT_ADVISOR_FLAG' is never projected at any step (also not under any sibling target).
recommendation: REAL_ODI_GAP -- column declared but never derived; DRD source 'CURRENT_ADVISOR_FLAG' is absent from the entire ODI chain
